Video.summary: Take a look back at the epic adventures, timeless dramas, and groundbreaking sci-fi classics that defined Charlton Heston's career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlton Heston: Man of Monumental Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers look back at the movies influenced by famous literary works.
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dive deeper into the classic books that became Hollywood blockbusters!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Stephen King to Kurt Vonnegut, Hollywood brings your favorite books to the big screen!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A master of comic timing and transformation, this is Peter Sellers at his most brilliant and unpredictable.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Many Faces of Peter Sellers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jack Nicholson's career is defined by charismatic charm, brilliant madness, and iconic performances across decades.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "The Big Sleep" to "Casablanca" and beyond, this is the best of Humphrey Bogart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrating the timeless tales of heroes, gods, and epic battles that defined classic cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A pantheon of prestige from more than 100 years of Hollywood, these are the classics we'll remember forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Return to the outlaw days of the Old West with classics starring Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Saddle up as your favorite filmmakers talk beloved big screen Westerns!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The 80s get crazy with comedy, horror, and high-stakes action flicks that break all the rules.
Video.grandparentTitle: 80s Cinema Vol. 4: Strange Lands and Unlikely Heroes
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brace yourself for wild thrills, dark mysteries, and heart-racing horror in this action-packed and genre-bending 80s collection.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Experience a flashback of horror, drama, and sci-fi with this unforgettable blend of unsettling and iconic 80s classics.
Video.grandparentTitle: 80s Cinema Vol. 6: Twisted Tales and Cinematic Thrills
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When it comes to comedy TFH creator Joe Dante has a soft spot for lovable oddballs, accidental heroes, and big-hearted dreamers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: SAW director Darren Lynn Bousman talks about his favorite psychological thrillers, dark dramas, and cult musicals.
Video.grandparentTitle: Guru Showcase: Darren Lynn Bousman Vol. 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gunman (Jack Palance) makes a fatal mistake when he and his gang ravage a town and murder the local priest (Lee Van Cleef). Now, the priest’s twin brother vows revenge, and teams with a local boy (Leif Garrett) to bring the gunman and his gang to their knees. Lee Van Cleef played dual roles in this 1977 Spaghetti Western produced by Golan-Globus Productions.
Video.title: God's Gun

Video.summary: Step back into the 1950s, the Golden Age of Hollywood, and discover the timeless classics and star-studded films that captivated audiences.
Video.title: Films of the 50's Volume 1

Video.summary: Explore the innovations and cinematic spectacles of the 1950s, a decade marked by the advent of widescreen formats and epic storytelling.
Video.title: Films of the 50's Volume 2

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers explore the revolutionary changes in 1960s cinema, where bold new voices and innovative techniques transformed the film industry.
Video.title: 60's Cinema Volume 1

Video.summary: Celebrate the iconic movies and unforgettable performances that defined the 1960s, leaving a lasting legacy on film history.
Video.title: 60's Cinema Volume 2

Video.summary: Here's how the films of the 1960s mirrored the decade's social and cultural upheavals, capturing the spirit of a transformative era.
Video.title: 60's Cinema Volume 3

Video.summary: Revisit the groundbreaking era of New Hollywood, where visionary directors redefined cinema with bold storytelling and innovative techniques.
Video.title: 70's Cinema Volume 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers look back on the 1970s films that captivated audiences and became cult classics.
Video.title: 70's Cinema Volume 2

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers examine the 1970s movies that pushed the boundaries of conventional filmmaking.
Video.title: 70's Cinema Volume 3

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers cracked open the 1980s time capsule, and here's what they found.
Video.title: 80's Cinema Volume 1

Video.summary: These are the films that thrilled a generation of moviegoers and defined the 1980s.
Video.title: 80's Cinema Volume 2

Video.summary: Journey through horror, sci-fi, and unforgettable adventures with this pulse-pounding collection of 80s blockbusters and cult classics.
Video.title: 80s Cinema Vol. 3: Dark Worlds and Danger

80s Cinema Vol. 3: Dark Worlds and Danger
80s Cinema Vol. 3: Dark Worlds and Danger

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers put the spotlight on the movies that audiences loved in the 1990s.
Video.title: 90's Cinema Volume 1

Video.summary: Saluting the best 90s films featuring Jim Carrey, Bill Murray, Tom Cruise, and more!
Video.title: 90's Cinema Volume 2

Video.summary: From 'Tenenbaums' to 'Bubba Ho-Tep,' these are some of the most influential films of the 2000s.
Video.title: 2000's Cinema Volume 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers return to talk about 'Drive,' 'The Counselor,' and more 2000s hits.
Video.title: 2000's Cinema Volume 2

Video.summary: What do you get when you cross “The Pink Panther,” with “Marx Brothers at the Circus?” A great time!
Video.title: Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1

Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1
Big Laughs on the Big Screen Vol. 1

Video.summary: While “The Raven” may fly high, others less fortunate are subject to a “Premature Burial” inside “The Tomb of Ligeia”
Video.title: Corman, Price and Poe
